title: 中日新聞杯の後に・最後の大舞台へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature gives her all in the Chunichi Shimbun
Hai and secures the victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a long journey, and Nice Nature has
come so far. Now, to become the shining main
character she's always dreamed of being...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature is determined to compete in the
esteemed Arima Kinen.
